title: CONEXIONES - 211info
text: LIFESTANCE HEALTH PORTLAND NE MLK CONEXIONES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers culturally and linguistically specific psychological evaluations and counseling. Evaluations are offered for cognitive functioning, attention problems (ADHD), disabilities, autism, and learning problems or disabilities for individuals from kindergarten age to college/university age. 3500 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Suite 200 Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Hispanic and Latinx identified individuals Hours: Front Desk: Monday-Friday 9am-6:30pm Appointments: Varies (503) 327-8205 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 327-8205 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare and most private insurances. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Clark, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet Bus Lines 6 and 24 Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Assessment for Substance Use Disorders * Hispanic/Latino Community Family Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Individual Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Mental Health Evaluation * Hispanic/Latino Community Perinatal Mood and Anxiety Disorders Treatment * Hispanic/Latino Community Substance Use Disorder Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFESTANCE HEALTH PORTLAND NE MLK
